---
title: "GA_1"
author: "moonyejoon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# 1. Library Load
```{r}
if (!require("knitr")) {
  install.packages("knitr")
}
library(knitr)

if (!require("lattice")) {
  install.packages("lattice")
}
library(lattice)

if (!require("zoo")) {
  install.packages("zoo")
}
library(zoo)

# quantmod 패키지
if (!require("quantmod")) {
  install.packages("quantmod")
}
library(quantmod)

# dplyr 패키지
if (!require("dplyr")) {
  install.packages("dplyr")
}
library(dplyr)

# lubridate 패키지
if (!require("lubridate")) {
  install.packages("lubridate")
}
library(lubridate)

# ggplot2 패키지
if (!require("ggplot2")) {
  install.packages("ggplot2")
}
library(ggplot2)

# FinCal 패키지
if (!require("FinCal")) {
  install.packages("FinCal")
}
library(FinCal)

if (!require("stringr")) {
  install.packages("stringr")
}
library(stringr)

if (!require("tidyverse")) {
  install.packages("tidyverse")
}
library(tidyverse)

if (!require("ggpubr")) {
  install.packages("ggpubr")
}
library(ggpubr)

```


# 2. functions
## 2.1 get_close_prices 주가 가져오기
```{r}
get_close_prices <- function(ticker, start_date, end_date) {
  # 시기 시작일과 종료일을 Date 형식으로 변환
  original_start_date <- as.Date(start_date)
  start_date <- original_start_date - months(1)
  end_date <- as.Date(end_date)

  # 주식 데이터 가져오기
  getSymbols(ticker, src = "yahoo", from = start_date, to = end_date, auto.assign = FALSE) -> stock_data

  # 종가(close price) 추출 및 열 이름 변경
  close_prices <- Cl(stock_data)
  colnames(close_prices) <- "Close"

  # 날짜와 종가로 구성된 데이터프레임 생성
  df <- data.frame(Date = index(close_prices), Close = coredata(close_prices))

  # 평균 및 표준편차 계산
  df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA, na.rm = TRUE)
  df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA, na.rm = TRUE)
  df$Gap <- NA

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    if (i >= 20) {
      df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
    }
  }

  df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

  # 원래 시작 날짜 이후의 데이터만 반환
  return(df[df$Date >= original_start_date, ])
}

```

```{r}
QQQ <- get_close_prices("QQQ", "2000-01-01", "2023-08-31")
QQQ
```


## 2.2 말 일 거래 get_last_day_rows
```{r}
# DF 데이터프레임에서 월별로 가장 늦은 날짜에 해당하는 행들을 추출하는 함수
get_last_day_rows <- function(df) {
  df$Date <- as.Date(df$Date)
  last_day_rows <- df %>%
    group_by(Year = year(Date), Month = month(Date)) %>%
    filter(Date == max(Date)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%  # ungroup after grouping operation
    select(-Year, -Month)  # remove Year and Month columns
  
  return(last_day_rows)
}
```
```{r}
QQQ_last <- get_last_day_rows(QQQ)
QQQ_last
```

## 2.3 irr calculate_irr
```{r}
calculate_irr <- function(cash_flows) {
  tryCatch({
    irr_value <- irr(cash_flows) * 100
    return(irr_value)
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(NA) # If an error occurs, return NA
  })
}

# 예시 캐시 플로우
cash_flows <- c(-400, -400, -400, -400,3360)
irr_result <- calculate_irr(cash_flows)
print(irr_result)
```
## 2.4 VA add_VA
```{r}
add_VA <- function(df) {
df$VA_Value_Required <- seq(from = 100, by = 100, length.out = nrow(df))
df$VA_Shares_Owned <- df$VA_Value_Required/df$Close
df$VA_Shares_Bought<-0
df$VA_Period_Invest <- NA
df$VA_Average_cost <- NA
df$VA_Invest_total <- NA
df$VA_ROI <- NA
df$VA_IRR <- NA
for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))){
  if(i==1){df$VA_Shares_Bought[i]=df$VA_Shares_Owned[i]}
  else{
    df$VA_Shares_Bought[i] <- df$VA_Shares_Owned[i]-df$VA_Shares_Owned[i-1]
  }
  df$VA_Period_Invest[i] <- df$VA_Shares_Bought[i] * df$Close[i]
  df$VA_Average_cost[i] <- mean(df$VA_Period_Invest[1:i])
  df$VA_Invest_total[i] <- sum(df$VA_Period_Invest[1:i])
  df$VA_ROI[i] <- (df$VA_Value_Required[i]-df$VA_Invest_total[i])/df$VA_Invest_total[i] *100
  df$VA_IRR[i] <- calculate_irr(c(-df$VA_Period_Invest[1:i-1], (df$VA_Value_Required[i] - df$VA_Period_Invest[i])))
}

return(df)
}
```

```{r}
QQQ_last <- add_VA(QQQ_last)
```


## 2.4 DCA add_DCA
```{r}
add_DCA <- function(df) {
  df$DCA_Period_Invest <- 100
  df$DCA_Shares_Bought <- df$DCA_Period_Invest/df$Close
  df$DCA_Shares_Owned <- cumsum(df$DCA_Shares_Bought)
  df$DCA_Period_Invest <- as.numeric(df$DCA_Period_Invest)
  df$DCA_Value <- df$Close * df$DCA_Shares_Owned
  # 초기화
  df$DCA_Average_cost <- NA
  df$DCA_Invest_total <- NA
  df$DCA_IRR<-NA
  df$DCA_ROI<-NA
  for(i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    df$DCA_Average_cost[i] <- mean(df$DCA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$DCA_Invest_total[i] <- sum(df$DCA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$DCA_ROI[i] <- (df$DCA_Value[i]-df$DCA_Invest_total[i])/df$DCA_Invest_total[i] *100
    df$DCA_IRR[i] <- calculate_irr(c(-df$DCA_Period_Invest[1:i-1], (df$DCA_Value[i] - df$DCA_Period_Invest[i])))
  }
  df$DCA_Value <- df$Close * df$DCA_Shares_Owned
  return(df)

}
```
```{r}
QQQ_last <- add_DCA(QQQ_last)
QQQ_last
```

## 2.5 GA add_GA
```{r}
add_GA <- function(df) {
  df$GA_Shares_Bought <- NA
  df$GA_Shares_Owned <- NA
  df$GA_Period_Invest <- NA
  df$GA_Value <- NA
  df$GA_Average_cost <- NA
  df$GA_Invest_total <- NA
  df$GA_ROI <- NA
  df$GA_IRR <- NA

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    df$GA_Period_Invest[i] <- df$VA_Period_Invest[i] * df$Gause[i] + df$DCA_Period_Invest[i] * (1 - df$Gause[i])
    df$GA_Shares_Bought[i] <- df$GA_Period_Invest[i]/ df$Close[i] 
    df$GA_Average_cost[i] <- mean(df$GA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$GA_Invest_total[i] <- sum(df$GA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    if (i == 1) {
      df$GA_Shares_Owned[i] = df$GA_Shares_Bought[i]
    } else {
      df$GA_Shares_Owned[i] <- df$GA_Shares_Bought[i] + df$GA_Shares_Owned[i - 1]
    }
    df$GA_Value[i] <- df$GA_Shares_Owned[i] * df$Close[i]
    df$GA_ROI[i] <- (df$GA_Value[i] - df$GA_Invest_total[i]) / df$GA_Invest_total[i] * 100
    df$GA_IRR[i] <- calculate_irr(c(-df$GA_Period_Invest[1:i-1], df$GA_Value[i]-df$GA_Period_Invest[i]))
  }
  return(df)
}
```
```{r}
QQQ_last <- add_GA(QQQ_last)
QQQ_last
```

```{r}
# 무위험자산 고정
irr_result <- 0
```

## 2.8 calculate_metrics 3년 주기
```{r}
rate <-irr_result
calculate_metrics_3y <- function(lst){
  result_df <- data.frame() # 결과를 저장할 빈 데이터프레임 생성

  for(tiker in tikers){
    df <- get_close_prices(tiker,"2000-01-01","2023-08-31")
    df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
    # 시작 년도와 마지막 년도 추출
    start_year <- year(min(df$Date))
    end_year <- year(max(df$Date))

    for (start in start_year:(end_year-2)) {
      end <- start + 3

      # 해당 기간 동안의 데이터만 선택하여 복사본 생성
      df_period1 <- df_last %>% filter(Date >= as.Date(paste0(start, "-01-01")) &
                                  Date < as.Date(paste0(end, "-01-01")))

      if(nrow(df_period1) > 0 ){
        df_period1 <- add_VA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_DCA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_GA(df_period1)

        Last_VA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$VA_ROI, 1)
        Last_DCA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$DCA_ROI, 1)
        Last_GA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$GA_ROI, 1)
        
        Last_VA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$VA_IRR, 1)
        Last_DCA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$DCA_IRR, 1)
        Last_GA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$GA_IRR, 1)
    
        Last_VA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_DCA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_GA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)

        Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

        new_row <- data.frame(
          Ticker = tiker,
          Year_Start = start,
          Last_VA_ROI = Last_VA_ROI,
          Last_DCA_ROI = Last_DCA_ROI,
          Last_GA_ROI = Last_GA_ROI,
          Last_VA_IRR = Last_VA_IRR,
          Last_DCA_IRR = Last_DCA_IRR,
          Last_GA_IRR = Last_GA_IRR,
          Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_VA_volatility = Last_VA_volatility,
          Last_DCA_volatility = Last_DCA_volatility,
          Last_GA_volatility = Last_GA_volatility
        )

       # 결과 데이터프레임에 추가
       result_df <- rbind(result_df, new_row)
     }
   }
  }
  return(result_df)
}

tikers <- c("SPY", "QQQ", "DIA")
df_3y <- calculate_metrics_3y(tikers)
print(df_3y)
```
```{r}
mean(df_3y$Last_GA_IRR)
mean(df_3y$Last_DCA_IRR)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_3y$Last_DCA_IRR, df_3y$Last_GA_IRR, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```

```{r}
mean(df_3y$Last_GA_ROI)
mean(df_3y$Last_DCA_ROI)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_3y$Last_DCA_ROI, df_3y$Last_GA_ROI, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```
```{r}
mean(df_3y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio)
mean(df_3y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio)

wilcox.test(df_3y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio, df_3y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```

## 2.9 calculate_metrics 5년 주기

```{r}
calculate_metrics_5y <- function(lst){
  result_df <- data.frame() # 결과를 저장할 빈 데이터프레임 생성

  for(tiker in tikers){
    df <- get_close_prices(tiker, "2000-01-01", "2023-08-31")
    df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
    # 시작 년도와 마지막 년도 추출
    start_year <- year(min(df$Date))
    end_year <- year(max(df$Date))

    for (start in start_year:(end_year-4)) {
      end <- start + 5

      # 해당 기간 동안의 데이터만 선택하여 복사본 생성
      df_period1 <- df_last %>% filter(Date >= as.Date(paste0(start, "-01-01")) &
                                  Date < as.Date(paste0(end, "-01-01")))

      if(nrow(df_period1) > 0 ){
        df_period1 <- add_VA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_DCA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_GA(df_period1)

        Last_VA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$VA_ROI, 1)
        Last_DCA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$DCA_ROI, 1)
        Last_GA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$GA_ROI, 1)
        
        Last_VA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$VA_IRR, 1)
        Last_DCA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$DCA_IRR, 1)
        Last_GA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$GA_IRR, 1)
    
        Last_VA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_DCA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_GA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)

        Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

        new_row <- data.frame(
          Ticker = tiker,
          Year_Start = start,
          Last_VA_ROI = Last_VA_ROI,
          Last_DCA_ROI = Last_DCA_ROI,
          Last_GA_ROI = Last_GA_ROI,
          Last_VA_IRR = Last_VA_IRR,
          Last_DCA_IRR = Last_DCA_IRR,
          Last_GA_IRR = Last_GA_IRR,
          Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_VA_volatility = Last_VA_volatility,
          Last_DCA_volatility = Last_DCA_volatility,
          Last_GA_volatility = Last_GA_volatility
        )

       # 결과 데이터프레임에 추가
       result_df <- rbind(result_df, new_row)
     }
   }
  }
  return(result_df)
}

tikers <- c("SPY", "QQQ", "DIA")
df_5y <- calculate_metrics_5y(tikers)
print(df_5y)
```


```{r}
mean(df_5y$Last_GA_IRR)
mean(df_5y$Last_DCA_IRR)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_5y$Last_DCA_IRR, df_5y$Last_GA_IRR, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```

```{r}
mean(df_5y$Last_GA_ROI)
mean(df_5y$Last_DCA_ROI)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_5y$Last_DCA_ROI, df_5y$Last_GA_ROI, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```
```{r}
mean(df_5y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio)
mean(df_5y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio)

wilcox.test(df_5y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio, df_5y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```
## 2.10 calculate_metrics 7년 주기

```{r}
calculate_metrics_7y <- function(lst){
  result_df <- data.frame() # 결과를 저장할 빈 데이터프레임 생성

  for(tiker in tikers){
    df <- get_close_prices(tiker, "2000-01-01", "2023-08-31")
    df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
    # 시작 년도와 마지막 년도 추출
    start_year <- year(min(df$Date))
    end_year <- year(max(df$Date))

    for (start in start_year:(end_year-6)) {
      end <- start + 7

      # 해당 기간 동안의 데이터만 선택하여 복사본 생성
      df_period1 <- df_last %>% filter(Date >= as.Date(paste0(start, "-01-01")) &
                                  Date < as.Date(paste0(end, "-01-01")))

      if(nrow(df_period1) > 0 ){
        df_period1 <- add_VA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_DCA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_GA(df_period1)

        Last_VA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$VA_ROI, 1)
        Last_DCA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$DCA_ROI, 1)
        Last_GA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$GA_ROI, 1)
        
        Last_VA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$VA_IRR, 1)
        Last_DCA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$DCA_IRR, 1)
        Last_GA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$GA_IRR, 1)
    
        Last_VA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_DCA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_GA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)

        Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

        new_row <- data.frame(
          Ticker = tiker,
          Year_Start = start,
          Last_VA_ROI = Last_VA_ROI,
          Last_DCA_ROI = Last_DCA_ROI,
          Last_GA_ROI = Last_GA_ROI,
          Last_VA_IRR = Last_VA_IRR,
          Last_DCA_IRR = Last_DCA_IRR,
          Last_GA_IRR = Last_GA_IRR,
          Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_VA_volatility = Last_VA_volatility,
          Last_DCA_volatility = Last_DCA_volatility,
          Last_GA_volatility = Last_GA_volatility
        )

       # 결과 데이터프레임에 추가
       result_df <- rbind(result_df, new_row)
     }
   }
  }
  return(result_df)
}

tikers <- c("SPY", "QQQ", "DIA")
df_7y <- calculate_metrics_7y(tikers)
print(df_7y)
```

```{r}
mean(df_7y$Last_GA_IRR)
mean(df_7y$Last_DCA_IRR)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_7y$Last_DCA_IRR, df_7y$Last_GA_IRR, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```

```{r}
mean(df_7y$Last_GA_ROI)
mean(df_7y$Last_DCA_ROI)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_7y$Last_DCA_ROI, df_7y$Last_GA_ROI, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```
```{r}
mean(df_7y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio)
mean(df_7y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio)

wilcox.test(df_7y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio, df_7y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```


## 2.11 calculate_metrics 10년 주기
```{r}
calculate_metrics_10y <- function(lst){
  result_df <- data.frame() # 결과를 저장할 빈 데이터프레임 생성

  for(tiker in tikers){
    df <- get_close_prices(tiker, "2000-01-01", "2023-08-31")
    df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
    # 시작 년도와 마지막 년도 추출
    start_year <- year(min(df$Date))
    end_year <- year(max(df$Date))

    for (start in start_year:(end_year-9)) {
      end <- start + 10

      # 해당 기간 동안의 데이터만 선택하여 복사본 생성
      df_period1 <- df_last %>% filter(Date >= as.Date(paste0(start, "-01-01")) &
                                  Date < as.Date(paste0(end, "-01-01")))

      if(nrow(df_period1) > 0 ){
        df_period1 <- add_VA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_DCA(df_period1)
        df_period1 <- add_GA(df_period1)

        Last_VA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$VA_ROI, 1)
        Last_DCA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$DCA_ROI, 1)
        Last_GA_ROI <- tail(df_period1$GA_ROI, 1)
        
        Last_VA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$VA_IRR, 1)
        Last_DCA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$DCA_IRR, 1)
        Last_GA_IRR <- tail(df_period1$GA_IRR, 1)
    
        Last_VA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_DCA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)
        Last_GA_volatility <- sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(252)

        Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
        Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio <- (mean(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) - rate) / sd(df_period1$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

        new_row <- data.frame(
          Ticker = tiker,
          Year_Start = start,
          Last_VA_ROI = Last_VA_ROI,
          Last_DCA_ROI = Last_DCA_ROI,
          Last_GA_ROI = Last_GA_ROI,
          Last_VA_IRR = Last_VA_IRR,
          Last_DCA_IRR = Last_DCA_IRR,
          Last_GA_IRR = Last_GA_IRR,
          Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_VA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio = Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio,
          Last_VA_volatility = Last_VA_volatility,
          Last_DCA_volatility = Last_DCA_volatility,
          Last_GA_volatility = Last_GA_volatility
        )

       # 결과 데이터프레임에 추가
       result_df <- rbind(result_df, new_row)
     }
   }
  }
  return(result_df)
}

tikers <- c("SPY", "QQQ", "DIA")
df_10y <- calculate_metrics_10y(tikers)
print(df_10y)
```

```{r}
mean(df_10y$Last_GA_IRR)
mean(df_10y$Last_DCA_IRR)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_10y$Last_DCA_IRR, df_10y$Last_GA_IRR, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```

```{r}
mean(df_10y$Last_GA_ROI)
mean(df_10y$Last_DCA_ROI)
```
```{r}
wilcox.test(df_10y$Last_DCA_ROI, df_10y$Last_GA_ROI, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```
```{r}
mean(df_10y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio)
mean(df_10y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio)

wilcox.test(df_10y$Last_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio, df_10y$Last_GA_Sharpe_Ratio, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less")
```

# 3. simulation
## 3.1 increasing
```{r}
# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate <- 0.3 # 30% 상승

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 1/4 지점마다 30%씩 상승하는 값 생성
random_walk <- numeric(n)
for (i in 1:4) {
  start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
  end_index <- i * quarter_n
  if (i == 1) {
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- initial_price * (1 + growth_rate)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  } else {
    prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  }
}

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = random_walk
)

# 추가 열 생성
library(zoo)
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 그래프 그리기
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

# 결과 출력
print(head(df, 30))  # 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인
```

```{r}
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
```

```{r}
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
```

```{r}
# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
```

```{r}
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

```{r}
# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate_up <- 0.3 # 30% 상승
growth_rate_down <- -0.23077 # 23.077% 하락

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 구간별 값 생성
random_walk <- numeric(n)
for (i in 1:4) {
  start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
  end_index <- i * quarter_n
  if (i <= 3) {
    if (i == 1) {
      random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- initial_price * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
    } else {
      prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
      random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
    }
  } else {
    prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_down)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  }
}

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = random_walk
)

# 추가 열 생성
library(zoo)
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 그래프 그리기
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)

# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

```{r}
# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate_up <- 0.3 # 30% 상승
growth_rate_down <- -0.23077 # 23.077% 하락

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 구간별 값 생성
random_walk <- numeric(n)
for (i in 1:4) {
  start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
  end_index <- i * quarter_n
  if (i == 1 || i == 2 || i == 4) {
    if (i == 1) {
      random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- initial_price * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
    } else {
      prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
      random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
    }
  } else {
    prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_down)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  }
}

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = random_walk
)

# 추가 열 생성
library(zoo)
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 그래프 그리기
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

# 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인
print(head(df, 30))

# 결과를 처리하기 위한 함수들 (예시로 add_VA, add_DCA, add_GA 함수 사용)
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)

# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)

# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")

```
```{r}
# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate_up <- 0.3 # 30% 상승
growth_rate_down <- -0.23077 # 23.077% 하락

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 구간별 값 생성
random_walk <- numeric(n)
for (i in 1:4) {
  start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
  end_index <- i * quarter_n
  if (i == 1 || i == 3 || i == 4) {
    if (i == 1) {
      random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- initial_price * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
    } else {
      prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
      random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
    }
  } else {
    prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_down)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  }
}

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = random_walk
)

# 추가 열 생성
library(zoo)
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 그래프 그리기
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

# 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인
print(head(df, 30))

# 결과를 처리하기 위한 함수들 (예시로 add_VA, add_DCA, add_GA 함수 사용)
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)

# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)

# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")

```

```{r}
# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate_up <- 0.3 # 30% 상승
growth_rate_down <- -0.23077 # 23.077% 하락

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 구간별 값 생성
random_walk <- numeric(n)
for (i in 1:4) {
  start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
  end_index <- i * quarter_n
  if (i == 1) {
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- initial_price * (1 + growth_rate_down)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  } else {
    prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  }
}

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = random_walk
)

# 추가 열 생성
library(zoo)
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 그래프 그리기
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

# 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인
print(head(df, 30))

# 결과를 처리하기 위한 함수들 (예시로 add_VA, add_DCA, add_GA 함수 사용)
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)

# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)

# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

## 3.2 decreasing

```{r}
# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate_up <- 0.3 # 30% 상승
growth_rate_down <- -0.23077 # 23.077% 하락

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 구간별 값 생성
random_walk <- numeric(n)
for (i in 1:4) {
  start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
  end_index <- i * quarter_n
  if (i == 1) {
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- initial_price * (1 + growth_rate_up)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  } else {
    prev_end_value <- random_walk[start_index - 1]
    random_walk[start_index:end_index] <- prev_end_value * (1 + growth_rate_down)^(seq(0, quarter_n - 1) / quarter_n)
  }
}

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = random_walk
)

# 추가 열 생성
library(zoo)
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 그래프 그리기
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

# 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인
print(head(df, 30))

# 결과를 처리하기 위한 함수들 (예시로 add_VA, add_DCA, add_GA 함수 사용)
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)

# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)

# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE)

# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")

```

```{r}
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
```

```{r}
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
colnames(df_last)
```
```{r}
df_last
```

```{r}
write.csv(df_last,"132.csv")

```

```{r}
# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
```
```{r}
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)  # 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터를 4등분하여 각 구간에 대해 하, 상, 하, 하 시나리오 설정
n <- 1000
segment_length <- n / 4

# 첫 번째 구간 (하락)
segment1 <- 369.42 - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 두 번째 구간 (상승)
segment2 <- min(segment1) + seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = 0.1, sd = 1))
# 세 번째 구간 (하락)
segment3 <- max(segment2) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 네 번째 구간 (하락)
segment4 <- min(segment3) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))

# 모든 구간 결합
close_prices <- c(segment1, segment2, segment3, segment4)

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = close_prices
)

# 추가 열 생성
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 결과 출력
print(head(df, 30))  # 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인

# 그래프 그리기
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
       x = "Date",
       y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
```

```{r}
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
colnames(df_last)
```
```{r}
# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
```
```{r}
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```
```{r}
library(zoo)  # rollapply를 위해 필요
library(ggplot2)  # 그래프 그리기를 위해 필요

set.seed(123)  # 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터를 4등분하여 각 구간에 대해 하, 하, 상, 하 시나리오 설정
n <- 1000
segment_length <- n / 4

# 첫 번째 구간 (하락)
segment1 <- 369.42 - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 두 번째 구간 (하락)
segment2 <- min(segment1) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 세 번째 구간 (상승)
segment3 <- min(segment2) + seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = 0.1, sd = 1))
# 네 번째 구간 (하락)
segment4 <- max(segment3) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))

# 모든 구간 결합
close_prices <- c(segment1, segment2, segment3, segment4)

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = close_prices
)

# 추가 열 생성
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 결과 출력
print(head(df, 30))  # 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인

# 그래프 그리기
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
       x = "Date",
       y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
```

```{r}
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
colnames(df_last)
```
```{r}
# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
```

```{r}
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

## 3.3 fluctuating
```{r}
set.seed(123)  # 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터를 4등분하여 각 구간에 대해 상, 하, 상, 하 시나리오 설정
n <- 1000
segment_length <- n / 4

# 첫 번째 구간 (상승)
segment1 <- 369.42 + seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = 0.1, sd = 1))
# 두 번째 구간 (하락)
segment2 <- max(segment1) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 세 번째 구간 (상승)
segment3 <- min(segment2) + seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = 0.1, sd = 1))
# 네 번째 구간 (하락)
segment4 <- max(segment3) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))

# 모든 구간 결합
close_prices <- c(segment1, segment2, segment3, segment4)

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = close_prices
)

# 추가 열 생성
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 결과 출력
print(head(df, 30))  # 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인

# 그래프 그리기
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
       x = "Date",
       y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
```

```{r}
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
colnames(df_last)
```
```{r}
# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
```
```{r}
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)  # 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터를 4등분하여 각 구간에 대해 하, 상, 하, 상 시나리오 설정
n <- 1000
segment_length <- n / 4

# 첫 번째 구간 (하락)
segment1 <- 369.42 - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 두 번째 구간 (상승)
segment2 <- min(segment1) + seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = 0.1, sd = 1))
# 세 번째 구간 (하락)
segment3 <- max(segment2) - seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = -0.1, sd = 1))
# 네 번째 구간 (상승)
segment4 <- min(segment3) + seq(0, 70, length.out = segment_length) + cumsum(rnorm(segment_length, mean = 0.1, sd = 1))

# 모든 구간 결합
close_prices <- c(segment1, segment2, segment3, segment4)

# 데이터프레임 생성
df <- data.frame(
  Date = dates[1:n],
  Close = close_prices
)

# 추가 열 생성
df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
df$Gap <- NA

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
    df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
  }
}

df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

# 결과 출력
print(head(df, 30))  # 데이터프레임의 첫 30개 행을 출력하여 확인

# 그래프 그리기
ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  labs(
       x = "Date",
       y = "Close Price") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
df_last
```

```{r}
df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
colnames(df_last)
```
```{r}
# 마지막 행 추출
last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

# 공통 지표 정리
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Value Required", "Shares Owned", "Shares Bought", "Period Invest", "Average Cost", "Invest Total", "ROI", "IRR"),
  VA = c(last_row$VA_Value_Required, last_row$VA_Shares_Owned, last_row$VA_Shares_Bought, last_row$VA_Period_Invest, last_row$VA_Average_cost, last_row$VA_Invest_total, last_row$VA_ROI, last_row$VA_IRR),
  DCA = c(NA, last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned, last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought, last_row$DCA_Period_Invest, last_row$DCA_Average_cost, last_row$DCA_Invest_total, last_row$DCA_ROI, last_row$DCA_IRR),
  GA = c(NA, last_row$GA_Shares_Owned, last_row$GA_Shares_Bought, last_row$GA_Period_Invest, last_row$GA_Average_cost, last_row$GA_Invest_total, last_row$GA_ROI, last_row$GA_IRR)
)

# 결과 출력
print(summary_df)
```
```{r}
# NA 값을 제외하고 평균과 표준편차 계산
sharpe_VA <- mean(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$VA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_DCA <- mean(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$DCA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_GA <- mean(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)/sd(df_last$GA_IRR, na.rm = TRUE)


# 결과 출력
cat("Sharpe Ratio (VA):", sharpe_VA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (DCA):", sharpe_DCA, "\n")
cat("Sharpe Ratio (GA):", sharpe_GA, "\n")
```

```{r}
library(zoo)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)

# 랜덤 시드를 설정하여 재현 가능한 결과를 얻습니다.
set.seed(123)

# 날짜 생성
start_date <- as.Date("2000-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2002-09-26")
dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date, to = end_date, by = "day")

# 1000일 동안의 데이터
n <- 1000
initial_price <- 100
growth_rate_up <- 0.3 # 30% 상승
growth_rate_down <- -0.23077 # 23.077% 하락

# 각 구간의 길이를 계산
quarter_n <- n / 4

# 각 경우의 수를 정의합니다.
scenarios <- list(
  c("up", "up", "up", "up"),
  c("up", "up", "up", "down"),
  c("up", "up", "down", "up"),
  c("up", "down", "up", "up"),
  c("down", "up", "up", "up"),
  c("up", "up", "down", "down"),
  c("up", "down", "up", "down"),
  c("up", "down", "down", "up"),
  c("down", "down", "up", "up"),
  c("down", "up", "up", "down"),
  c("down", "up", "down", "up"),
  c("up", "down", "down", "down"),
  c("down", "up", "down", "down"),
  c("down", "down", "up", "down"),
  c("down", "down", "down", "up"),
  c("down", "down", "down", "down")
)

# 각 시나리오에 따른 색상을 정의합니다.
colors <- c(
  rep("blue", 5),   # 상상상상, 상상상하, 상상하상, 상하상상, 하상상상, 파란색
  rep("black", 6),  # 상상하하, 상하상하, 상하하상, 하하상상, 하상상하, 하상하상, 검은색
  rep("red", 5)     # 상하하하, 하상하하, 하하상하, 하하하상, 하하하하, 빨간색
)

# 결과를 저장할 데이터프레임
results <- data.frame()
plots <- list()

# 각 시나리오에 대해 데이터를 생성하고 분석합니다.
for (index in 1:length(scenarios)) {
  scenario <- scenarios[[index]]
  color <- colors[index]
  
  prices <- numeric(n)
  prices[1] <- initial_price
  price_changes <- numeric(5)
  price_changes[1] <- initial_price
  
  for (i in 1:4) {
    start_index <- (i - 1) * quarter_n + 1
    end_index <- i * quarter_n
    if (i > 1) {
      prices[start_index] <- prices[start_index - 1]
    }
    if (scenario[i] == "up") {
      prices[start_index:end_index] <- seq(from = prices[start_index], to = prices[start_index] * (1 + growth_rate_up), length.out = quarter_n)
    } else {
      prices[start_index:end_index] <- seq(from = prices[start_index], to = prices[start_index] * (1 + growth_rate_down), length.out = quarter_n)
    }
    price_changes[i + 1] <- prices[end_index]
  }

  # 데이터프레임 생성
  df <- data.frame(
    Date = dates[1:n],
    Close = prices
  )

  # 추가 열 생성
  df$Mean <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = mean, align = "right", fill = NA)
  df$Sd <- rollapply(df$Close, width = 20, FUN = sd, align = "right", fill = NA)
  df$Gap <- NA
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    if (!is.na(df$Mean[i]) && !is.na(df$Sd[i]) && df$Sd[i] != 0) {
      df$Gap[i] = (df$Close[i] - df$Mean[i]) / df$Sd[i]
    }
  }

  df$Gause <- dnorm(df$Gap, mean = 0, sd = 0.8)

  # VA, DCA, GA 지표 계산 (함수 사용)
  df_last <- get_last_day_rows(df)
  df_last <- add_VA(df_last)
  df_last <- add_DCA(df_last)
  df_last <- add_GA(df_last)
  # 변동성 계산
  VA_volatility <- sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(12)
  DCA_volatility <- sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(12)
  GA_volatility <- sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(12)
  # 마지막 행 추출
  last_row <- df_last[nrow(df_last), ]

  # 공통 지표 정리
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    Scenario = paste(scenario, collapse = "-"),
    Price_Changes = paste(round(price_changes, 2), collapse = "-"),
    VA_Value_Required = last_row$VA_Value_Required,
    VA_Shares_Owned = last_row$VA_Shares_Owned,
    VA_Shares_Bought = last_row$VA_Shares_Bought,
    VA_Period_Invest = last_row$VA_Period_Invest,
    VA_Average_Cost = last_row$VA_Average_cost,
    VA_Invest_Total = last_row$VA_Invest_total,
    VA_ROI = last_row$VA_ROI,
    VA_IRR = last_row$VA_IRR,
    DCA_Shares_Owned = last_row$DCA_Shares_Owned,
    DCA_Shares_Bought = last_row$DCA_Shares_Bought,
    DCA_Period_Invest = last_row$DCA_Period_Invest,
    DCA_Average_Cost = last_row$DCA_Average_cost,
    DCA_Invest_Total = last_row$DCA_Invest_total,
    DCA_ROI = last_row$DCA_ROI,
    DCA_IRR = last_row$DCA_IRR,
    GA_Shares_Owned = last_row$GA_Shares_Owned,
    GA_Shares_Bought = last_row$GA_Shares_Bought,
    GA_Period_Invest = last_row$GA_Period_Invest,
    GA_Average_Cost = last_row$GA_Average_cost,
    GA_Invest_Total = last_row$GA_Invest_total,
    GA_ROI = last_row$GA_ROI,
    GA_IRR = last_row$GA_IRR,
    VA_Sharpe = mean(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(df_last$VA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE),
    DCA_Sharpe = mean(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(df_last$DCA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE),
    GA_Sharpe = mean(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(df_last$GA_ROI, na.rm = TRUE),
    VA_mean_Period_Invest = mean(df_last$VA_Period_Invest, na.rm = TRUE),
    DCA_mean_Period_Invest = mean(df_last$DCA_Period_Invest, na.rm = TRUE),
    GA_mean_Period_Invest = mean(df_last$GA_Period_Invest, na.rm = TRUE),
    VA_std_Period_Invest = sd(df_last$VA_Period_Invest, na.rm = TRUE),
    DCA_std_Period_Invest = sd(df_last$DCA_Period_Invest, na.rm = TRUE),
    GA_std_Period_Invest = sd(df_last$GA_Period_Invest, na.rm = TRUE),
    VA_Volatility = VA_volatility,
    DCA_Volatility = DCA_volatility,
    GA_Volatility = GA_volatility
  )

  # 결과를 결과 데이터프레임에 추가
  results <- rbind(results, summary_df)

  # 그래프 생성
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Close)) +
    geom_line(color = color) +
    labs(
      x = "Date",
      y = "Close Price"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  plots[[index]] <- p
}

# 4x4 행렬로 그래프 출력
do.call(grid.arrange, c(plots, ncol = 4))

# 결과 출력
print(results)

```
```{r}
write.csv(results,"rlt.csv")
```


## 3.4 Bollinger Band Example
```{r}
# 주식 데이터 가져오기 (여기서는 Apple의 최근 1년 주식 데이터)
getSymbols("AAPL", src = "yahoo", from = Sys.Date() - 365)

# 볼린저 밴드 계산 (여기서는 20일 이동 평균을 사용)
bbands <- BBands(Cl(AAPL), n=20)

# 볼린저 밴드와 원래 데이터 합치기
df <- data.frame(Date=index(AAPL), coredata(AAPL), coredata(bbands))

# 첫 20일 제거
df <- df[-(1:20), ]

# Overbought, Oversold 지점 찾기
overbought_index <- which.max(df$AAPL.Close - df$up) 
oversold_index <- which.max(df$dn - df$AAPL.Close) 

# ggplot으로 그리기
ggplot(df, aes(x=Date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y=AAPL.Close), color="black", size=1.5) + # 주가 선 색상을 검정색으로 변경 
  geom_line(aes(y=dn), color="red", size=1.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y=mavg), color="grey", size=1.5) + # 중앙선 색상을 회색으로 변경 
  geom_line(aes(y=up), color="#006400", size=1.5) + 
  labs(x="Date", y="Price", title="Bollinger Bands") + 
  annotate("text", x = middle_date, y = df$dn[floor(nrow(df)/2)], label = "Lower Band",
           hjust=-0.7, fontface='bold', size=4, colour='red') + 
  annotate("text", x = middle_date, y = df$mavg[floor(nrow(df)/2)], label = "Middle Band",
           hjust=-0.01, fontface='bold', size=4, colour='grey') + # 중앙선 라벨 색상도 회색으로 변경  
   annotate("text", x = middle_date, y = df$up[floor(nrow(df)/2)], label ="Upper Band",
           hjust=1.4, fontface='bold', size=4 , colour='#006400') +
  annotate("text", x = df$Date[overbought_index], y = df$up[overbought_index] + 5, label ="Overbought",
           hjust=0.7, fontface='bold', size=2 , colour='#006400') + 
  annotate("text", x = df$Date[oversold_index], y = df$dn[oversold_index] - 5, label ="Oversold",
           hjust=0.9, fontface='bold', size=2 , colour='red')



```



# 4. plue

## 4.1 CGM
```{r}
# CGMFX 데이터 가져오기
CGMFX<-get_close_prices("CGMFX", "2019-01-02	","2022-12-05")

# NA 값 제거하기
# dplyr 패키지 로드
library(dplyr)

# SPY 데이터 프레임에서 특정 날짜 범위의 데이터만 추출
SPY_day <- filter(SPY, Date >= "2019-01-02" & Date <= "2022-12-02")
```
```{r}
# 각각의 성장률 계산 (첫 날 대비 변화율)
SPY_day$Growth <- SPY_day$Close / SPY_day$Close[1]
CGMFX$Growth <- CGMFX$Close / CGMFX$Close[1]

# 두 데이터 합치기
data_combined <- rbind(
  mutate(SPY_day, ETF="SPY"),
  mutate(CGMFX, ETF="CGMFX")
)

# 성장률 비교 그래프 생성
ggplot(data_combined, aes(x=Date, y=Growth, color=ETF)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="Growth comparison: SPY vs CGMFX",
       x="Date",
       y="Growth rate",
       color="ETF")
```
```{r}

# 성장률 차이 계산
growth_diff <- CGMFX$Growth-SPY_day$Growth 

# 데이터 프레임 생성 (날짜와 성장률 차이)
data_diff <- data.frame(Date=SPY_day$Date, GrowthDiff=growth_diff)

# 그래프 생성
ggplot(data_diff, aes(x=Date, y=GrowthDiff)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="Growth difference: SPY vs CGMFX",
       x="Date",
       y="Growth rate difference")
+theme_bw()
```

```{r}
# FMAGX 데이터 가져오기
FMAGX <- get_close_prices("FMAGX", "1993-02-01", "2022-12-05")
SPY_day <- get_close_prices("SPY", "1993-02-01", "2022-12-05")

# 각각의 성장률 계산 (첫 날 대비 변화율)
SPY_day$Growth <- SPY_day$Close / SPY_day$Close[1]
FMAGX$Growth <- FMAGX$Close / FMAGX$Close[1]

# 성장률 차이 계산
growth_diff <- FMAGX$Growth - SPY_day$Growth 

# 데이터 프레임 생성 (날짜와 성장률 차이)
data_diff <- data.frame(Date=SPY_day$Date, GrowthDiff=growth_diff)

# 그래프 생성
ggplot(data_diff, aes(x=Date, y=GrowthDiff)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title="Growth difference: SPY vs FMAGX",
       x="Date",
       y="Growth rate difference") +
  theme_bw()

```
```{r}
# 패키지 버전 확인
packages <- c("knitr", "lattice", "zoo", "quantmod", "dplyr", "lubridate", "ggplot2", "FinCal", "stringr", "tidyverse", "ggpubr")

package_versions <- sapply(packages, packageVersion)

# 버전을 출력
package_versions

```
## 4.2 Test

```{r}

# Example data
data <- data.frame(
  Period = 1:5,
  Close = c(100, 70, 49, 35, 24)
)

calculate_irr <- function(cash_flows) {
  tryCatch({
    irr_value <- irr(cash_flows) * 100
    return(irr_value)
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(NA) # If an error occurs, return NA
  })
}

# VA 추가 함수
add_VA <- function(df) {
  df$VA_Value_Required <- seq(from = 400, by = 400, length.out = nrow(df))
  df$VA_Shares_Owned <- df$VA_Value_Required / df$Close
  df$VA_Shares_Bought <- 0
  df$VA_Period_Invest <- NA
  df$VA_Average_cost <- NA
  df$VA_Invest_total <- NA
  df$VA_ROI <- NA
  df$VA_IRR <- NA
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    if (i == 1) {
      df$VA_Shares_Bought[i] = df$VA_Shares_Owned[i]
    } else {
      df$VA_Shares_Bought[i] <- df$VA_Shares_Owned[i] - df$VA_Shares_Owned[i - 1]
    }
    df$VA_Period_Invest[i] <- df$VA_Shares_Bought[i] * df$Close[i]
    df$VA_Average_cost[i] <- mean(df$VA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$VA_Invest_total[i] <- sum(df$VA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$VA_ROI[i] <- (df$VA_Value_Required[i] - df$VA_Invest_total[i]) / df$VA_Invest_total[i] * 100
    df$VA_IRR[i] <- calculate_irr(c(-df$VA_Period_Invest[1:i-1], df$VA_Value_Required[i]-df$VA_Period_Invest[i]))
  }
  return(df)
}

# DCA 추가 함수
add_DCA <- function(df) {
  df$DCA_Period_Invest <- 400
  df$DCA_Shares_Bought <- df$DCA_Period_Invest / df$Close
  df$DCA_Shares_Owned <- cumsum(df$DCA_Shares_Bought)
  df$DCA_Value <- df$Close * df$DCA_Shares_Owned
  df$DCA_Average_cost <- NA
  df$DCA_Invest_total <- NA
  df$DCA_ROI <- NA
  df$DCA_IRR <- NA
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    df$DCA_Average_cost[i] <- mean(df$DCA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$DCA_Invest_total[i] <- sum(df$DCA_Period_Invest[1:i])
    df$DCA_ROI[i] <- (df$DCA_Value[i] - df$DCA_Invest_total[i]) / df$DCA_Invest_total[i] * 100
    df$DCA_IRR[i] <- calculate_irr(c(-df$DCA_Period_Invest[1:i-1], df$DCA_Value[i]-df$DCA_Period_Invest[i]))
  }
  return(df)
}


# 데이터에 함수 적용
data_with <- add_VA(data)
data_with <- add_DCA(data_with)

# 결과 출력
print(data_with)


```
```{r}
data_with$VA_IRR
```
```{r}
data_with$DCA_IRR
```

## 4.3 QQQ DIA SPY 08/08 ~ 23/08
```{r}
# 결과 출력
irr_result <- 0
```

```{r}
QQQ <- get_close_prices("QQQ","2013-08-01","2023-08-31")
QQQ_last <- get_last_day_rows(QQQ)
QQQ_last <- add_VA(QQQ_last)
QQQ_last <- add_DCA(QQQ_last)
QQQ_last <- add_GA(QQQ_last)
tail(QQQ_last)
```
```{r}
DIA <- get_close_prices("DIA","2013-08-01","2023-08-31")
DIA_last <- get_last_day_rows(DIA)
DIA_last <- add_VA(DIA_last)
DIA_last <- add_DCA(DIA_last)
DIA_last <- add_GA(DIA_last)
tail(DIA_last)
```
```{r}
SPY <- get_close_prices("SPY","2013-08-01","2023-08-31")
SPY_last <- get_last_day_rows(SPY)
SPY_last <- add_VA(SPY_last)
SPY_last <- add_DCA(SPY_last)
SPY_last <- add_GA(SPY_last)
tail(SPY_last)
```

```{r}
rate <-irr_result
mean(QQQ_last$VA_IRR[dim(QQQ_last)[1]],DIA_last$VA_IRR[dim(DIA_last)[1]],SPY_last$VA_IRR[dim(SPY_last)[1]])
```
```{r}
mean(QQQ_last$DCA_IRR[dim(QQQ_last)[1]],DIA_last$DCA_IRR[dim(DIA_last)[1]],SPY_last$DCA_IRR[dim(SPY_last)[1]])
```
```{r}
mean(QQQ_last$GA_IRR[dim(QQQ_last)[1]],DIA_last$GA_IRR[dim(DIA_last)[1]],SPY_last$GA_IRR[dim(SPY_last)[1]])
```
```{r}
mean(QQQ_last$VA_ROI[dim(QQQ_last)[1]],DIA_last$VA_ROI[dim(DIA_last)[1]],SPY_last$VA_ROI[dim(SPY_last)[1]])
mean(QQQ_last$DCA_ROI[dim(QQQ_last)[1]],DIA_last$DCA_ROI[dim(DIA_last)[1]],SPY_last$DCA_ROI[dim(SPY_last)[1]])
mean(QQQ_last$GA_ROI[dim(QQQ_last)[1]],DIA_last$GA_ROI[dim(DIA_last)[1]],SPY_last$GA_ROI[dim(SPY_last)[1]])

```


```{r}
mean(sd(QQQ_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252),
     sd(DIA_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252),
     sd(SPY_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252))

```
```{r}
mean(sd(QQQ_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252),
     sd(DIA_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252),
     sd(SPY_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252))
```
```{r}
mean(sd(QQQ_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252),
     sd(DIA_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252),
     sd(SPY_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)*sqrt(252))
```
```{r}
QQQ_VA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(QQQ_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(QQQ_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
DIA_VA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(DIA_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(DIA_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
SPY_VA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(SPY_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(SPY_last$VA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
mean(QQQ_VA_Sharpe_Ratio, DIA_VA_Sharpe_Ratio, SPY_VA_Sharpe_Ratio)
```
```{r}
QQQ_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(QQQ_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(QQQ_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
DIA_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(DIA_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(DIA_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
SPY_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(SPY_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(SPY_last$DCA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
mean(QQQ_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio, DIA_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio, SPY_DCA_Sharpe_Ratio)
```

```{r}
QQQ_GA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(QQQ_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(QQQ_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
DIA_GA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(DIA_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(DIA_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
SPY_GA_Sharpe_Ratio<- (mean(SPY_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)-rate)/sd(SPY_last$GA_ROI,na.rm = TRUE)
mean(QQQ_GA_Sharpe_Ratio, DIA_GA_Sharpe_Ratio, SPY_GA_Sharpe_Ratio)
```
```{r}
VA_AC<- mean(QQQ_last$VA_Average_cost[dim(QQQ_last)[1]], DIA_last$VA_Average_cost[dim(DIA_last)[1]], SPY_last$VA_Average_cost[dim(SPY_last)[1]] )
VA_AC
DCA_AC<- mean(QQQ_last$DCA_Average_cost[dim(QQQ_last)[1]], DIA_last$DCA_Average_cost[dim(DIA_last)[1]], SPY_last$DCA_Average_cost[dim(SPY_last)[1]] )
DCA_AC
GA_AC<- mean(QQQ_last$GA_Average_cost[dim(QQQ_last)[1]], DIA_last$GA_Average_cost[dim(DIA_last)[1]], SPY_last$GA_Average_cost[dim(SPY_last)[1]] )
GA_AC
```

```{r}
# 각 데이터프레임에서 투자액이 특정 금액 이상인 경우를 카운트하는 함수
count_investments <- function(df, column) {
  sapply(c(200, 300, 400, 500), function(x) sum(df[[column]] >= x))
}

# 모든 종목의 투자액 카운트를 합산
VA_counts <- data.frame(
  Investment = c(200, 300, 400, 500),
  Count = rowSums(sapply(list(QQQ_last, DIA_last, SPY_last), count_investments, column = "VA_Period_Invest"))
)

GA_counts <- data.frame(
  Investment = c(200, 300, 400, 500),
  Count = rowSums(sapply(list(QQQ_last, DIA_last, SPY_last), count_investments, column = "GA_Period_Invest"))
)

# 데이터를 long format으로 변환
VA_counts_long <- reshape2::melt(VA_counts, id.vars = "Investment", variable.name = "Method", value.name = "Count")
GA_counts_long <- reshape2::melt(GA_counts, id.vars = "Investment", variable.name = "Method", value.name = "Count")

# 합쳐서 하나의 데이터프레임 생성
combined_counts <- rbind(
  transform(VA_counts_long, Method = "VA_Period_Invest"),
  transform(GA_counts_long, Method = "GA_Period_Invest")
)

# ggplot 객체 생성
plot <- ggplot(combined_counts, aes(x = Method, y = Count, fill = Method)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ Investment, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = 0.5, size = 5) +  # 텍스트를 막대의 중앙에 위치
  labs(title = "Investment Counts Above Thresholds", x = "Method", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14),  # 페이싯 제목의 글자 크기 조절
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),   # 축 텍스트 크기 조절
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),  # 축 제목 크기 조절
    legend.position = "none"               # 범례 제거
  )

# 결과 출력
print(plot)

```
